query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a black-and-white patterned hooded jacket and blue jeans rides a silver kick scooter along a paved surface. Behind them stretches a wall covered in large-scale graffiti with bold areas of green, yellow, orange, blue, and brown. The rider leans forward with both hands on the handlebars and one foot on the scooter deck.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred photograph shows a person in a black-and-white patterned hooded jacket and blue jeans riding a silver kick scooter, their body and the graffiti-covered wall behind them streaked horizontally to emphasize speed. The image has the unsteady, improvised energy of a snapshot, with the background colors of green, yellow, orange, and blue smeared into flowing bands and the ground rendered as a textured blur.
